Mi^i ^l 22 ^ , 2 0 1 2 " ^ " m ^ ^ ^ 3 T ^ f V ^ f ^ " m 68 ^ ^ t ^TT^ 1EITO ^ 3 TP^, ^ft ^fr - q ^ $, "cfirR^f 2. ^rafr ^ i ^ f=RtR afft 71^ ^m-:*FTO *rc TOftftra tftiwtf sntefa s r f t e m (3TKI^ a?k sm W ^ ' 1wr, 2009 sm ? n f e sf*f i ["H^T. *i. 9/32/20 i 1-tily.ti] ^nje&T ^TTT, Wjjfd "St^T MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th May, 2012 S.0.1171(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 53C read with Section 53 F of the Competition Act, 2002 (12 of 2003), the Central Government hereby appoints Mr. Justice (Retd.)V.S. Sirpurkar, as Chairperson of the Competition Appellate Tribunal with effect from 22nd May, 2012 for a period of five years or till he attains the age of 68 years whichever is earlier. 2. The terms and conditions of his service will be governed by the Competition Appellate Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and other terms and conditions of service of Chairperson and other Members) Rules, 2009 as amended fxomtimetotime.
